center.name: Moree, New South Wales
center.summary: Moree, New South Wales是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括绿宝石鹦鹉，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In New South Wales, it is found in a broad band across the central and eastern parts of the state, with its western limits delineated by Moree, Quambone, Hillston, Narrandera and Deniliquin

links.label: 分布于
